g.text: 802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, Alberta | File VAL251026
A newly constructed 10-unit multifamily property located at 6547 59 Ave in
Red Deer, sold in April 2024 for $1,490,000 ($149,000 per unit). The property
was purchased by 1813392 Alberta Ltd from Sonrae Holdings Inc in an arm’s-
length, cash-to-seller transaction. Built in 2001, the 2.5-storey building offers
a mix of 10 two-bedroom units. Project amenities include elevators and in-
suite laundry facilities, with unit features such as air conditioning and modern
appliances. The property was in excellent condition and generated an
estimated net operating income of $112,890, reﬂecting a capitalization rate
